arts.ttl: Antoine Griezmann equals all-time Lionel Messi La Liga record
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid star Antoine Griezmann has on Sunday evening secured for himself a fresh piece of Spanish football history. This comes owing to his appearance in the club’s latest outing.…

arts.ttl: Watch: Atlético fans spit on and vandalise Thibaut Courtois plaque ahead of Barcelona clash
arts.sum: Sections of the Atlético Madrid fanbase on Sunday evening made use of the opportunity to make clear their disgust with former Rojiblancos star Thibaut Courtois. Goalkeeper Courtois for his part…

arts.ttl: Flick offers De Jong update after midfielder misses Barca vs Atleti
arts.sum: The German was all set to start Frenkie de Jong in midfield against Diego Simeone’s side but has opted for Marc Casado instead. Barcelona manager Hansi Flick has admitted he had to make a late change to his XI for Sunday’s match against Atletico Madrid .

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms plans to watch Atlético vs Barcelona clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has confirmed that he will be watching on intently this evening, when Atlético Madrid and Barcelona lock horns in La Liga. The headline fixture…

arts.ttl: Why Frenkie de Jong has been left out of Barcelona’s squad to face Atlético
arts.sum: An explanation for the surprising last-minute absence of Frenkie de Jong from Barcelona’s squad to face Atlético Madrid has been provided. Barcelona are of course primed to return to action…

arts.ttl: Official: Frenkie de Jong drops out as Barcelona name XI to face Atlético
arts.sum: The XI of players selected by Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick to take on Atlético Madrid this evening has been unveiled online. And it features one altogether noteworthy change, in…

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'make stunning offer' for Barcelona superstar ahead of summer market
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly put a £59m offer on the table for Barcelona attacker Raphinha, who has been in stunning form this season.

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal receives MEGA offer to leave Barcelona
arts.sum: Barcelona superstar Lamine Yamal has reportedly received a mega contract offer from Saudi Arabia amid questions over his future at Camp Nou. Despite receiving an extremely attractive offer from the Saudi Pro League, Yamal has made it clear that he wishes to stay at Barcelona in order to establish himself as a club legend at Camp Nou.

arts.ttl: The 2 Barcelona stars who ‘take care’ of Lamine Yamal
arts.sum: Two leading members of the first-team squad at La Liga giants Barcelona have been tasked with acting as mentors for young teammate Lamine Yamal across the season to date. That’s…

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Jonathan David battle 'intensifies' with six clubs 'in the running' for Lille goal machine
arts.sum: Barcelona, Liverpool and Manchester United are reportedly among six clubs interested in signing Lille forward Jonathan David on a free transfer.
